lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Ssshhh! What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it's not every day you see a man up a tree.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm trying to observe a suspect. Leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's this all about?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hadn't you heard? You'd better go and talk to the other guard, the one by the bank door. He'll tell you all about it.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Go on, ask him what's wrong with the bank wall. He loves when people ask him that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, if you say so..

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is about the bank robbery, right?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Yes, that's right. We're keeping the suspect under tight observation for the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you just... I dunno... arrest him?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm not meant to discuss the case. You know what confidentiality rules are like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not being very subtle up there.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'd be doing a lot better if nits like you didn't come crowding around me all day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But your legs are hanging down!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I do anything to help?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: That's very kind of you. I'd rather like a nice bowl of stew, if you could fetch me one. I don't get many meal breaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want a bowl of stew?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: If you wouldn't mind...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll think about it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Yes, what do you... I say, is that stew for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, take the stew!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Gosh, that's very kind of you! Here, have a few coins for your trouble...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I want to keep this stew!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Fair enough. But if you change your mind, I'll probably still be here.

sections.title: Using a stew on the tree

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's some stew.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Gosh, that's very kind of you! Here, have a few coins for your trouble...

sections.title: Interacting with the guard before he drops his bowl

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I should leave him in peace to finish his stew!

sections.title: Using any other item on the tree

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Why the demoninikin are you waving THAT at me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I thought you'd like it.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Erm... No thanks! Now, if you don't mind, I'm trying to observe this suspect!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry!

sections.title: When using the right-click chop-down option with an axe on hand

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Ooooch!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Oi!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Watch what you're doing with that axe, you nit!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You'll blow my cover! I'm meant to be hidden!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Will you stop that?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Don't draw attention to me!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hey - gerroff me!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Ow! That really hurt!
